content.en:
"Elite Ancestor, and the top Elite Ancestor, second only to the top Ancestor combat power, this is impossible, you have just broken through to the Ancestor Realm!"

The Ancestor of All Things was confused.

Who is not a demon genius, in the dark forbidden realm, the strong people who can break through to the ancestral realm are all invincible opponents who swept through the same period, and they are real demons.

Therefore, everyone is evil, after everyone breaks through the ancestor, they are all ordinary ancestors, although some are strong and some are weak, but the gap is not big.

But what about Ye Tian?

What kind of genius is this, as soon as he breaks through, he has a combat power second only to the top ancestor, this is too exaggerated!

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, I'm joking with you!"

The ancestor of all things was intimidated.

What if he has an innate ancestral weapon, what about the enchantment ancestral crystal, he still can't beat Ye Tian!

He was only a weaker level of the Elite Ancestor, but Ye Tian was second only to the level of the Elite Ancestor's combat power, and the gap between the two sides was too big.

"Ancestor of All Things, I'll kill you and tell you, it's not a joke!"

Ye Tian's murderous intent was revealed, and he did not hide it at all.

"Wanfa Ancestor, do you really want to be like this? even if my strength is not as good as yours, but it is not without the strength of a fight, you don't have an innate ancestral weapon, although you can hurt me, but it is difficult to wear out my ancestor body, and it is not easy to kill me!"

The Ancestor of All Things reminded.

But in fact, he was still very panicked, and now he was just forcibly calming down.

"Yes, it is said that I know that it is indeed difficult for ordinary ancestor attacks to wipe out the ancestor body of the ancestor, and only the innate ancestor weapon and the ultimate ancestor technique can cause great damage to the ancestor body!"

Ye Tian said.

"That's right, you don't have an innate ancestral weapon, and you just broke through the ancestor, and it is impossible for you to have the ultimate ancestral skill, although it is not clear why you can have the strength of an elite ancestor, but it is a little difficult for you to kill me. For example, how about we reconcile, all the previous things are settled!"

The Ancestor of All Things proposed.

"It's true that I don't have an Innate Ancestral Weapon, but who told you that I didn't have the Ultimate Ancestral Technique?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Bang!!!!

The Ultimate Ancestral Technique Ancestral Armor is on!

The ultimate ancestral skill streamer is unleashed!

In an instant, Ye Tian killed the ancestor of all things.

Then, Ye Tian slammed into the Ancestor of All Things with a punch, and exerted the Ultimate Ancestor Technique Dominance.

For the ancestors, except for the innate ancestor weapon, the other weapons are garbage, far less powerful than the body of the ancestor, and even the holy technique is not as powerful as the ancestor's casual punch.

Therefore, if there is no innate ancestral weapon and ultimate ancestral technique, then the ancestor can use nothing and directly fight with his body, which is the most powerful means.

"Ultimate Ancestral Technique!!!

The pupils of the Ancestor of All Things shrank sharply, and he immediately urged the Innate Ancestor Weapon Long Sword in his hand with all his might.

Bang!!!!

The Innate Ancestor Weapon Long Sword collided with Ye Tian's Nine Pole Ancestor Technique, and the Innate Ancestor Weapon Long Sword directly collapsed, and this punch directly hit the body of the Ancestor of All Things.

Click!!

The body of the Ancestor of All Things was blasted with a punch, but it healed in an instant.

Although the Ancestor of All Things recalled the Innate Ancestor Weapon, his Innate Ancestor Weapon could not penetrate Ye Tian's Endless Ancestor Body at all.

With the Endless Ancestor Body and the Nine Extremes Ancestral Technique Ancestral Armor, the strength of the Ancestor of All Things was not as good as Ye Tian, if he could use the Innate Ancestor Weapon to break Ye Tian's defense, then his strength would have already reached the top Ancestor combat power.

Bang bang bang!!

Ye Tian shot again and again, blowing up the body of the ancestor of all things again and again.

"Every blow annihilated one thousandth of the Ancestral Body!!"

The Ancestor of All Things was terrified.

This showed that Ye Tian only needed a thousand attacks, which was enough to bombard him.

A thousand attacks won't take long for the Ancestors.

"Holy Ancestor, come and save me!!"

The ancestors of all things seek the Tao.

The Holy Ancestor frowned and said, "Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, spare the Ancestor of All Things!"

Ye Tian didn't hear it, and continued to attack the Ancestor of All Things.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't give himself face, the Holy Ancestor was also a little annoyed, and was ready to make a move to break the enchantment.

However, just as he was making a move, Ye Tian's doppelganger Aoba Ancestor made a move.

Bang!!!!

The Aoba Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor collided, no matter how good they were.

"Aoba Ancestor, you are the doppelganger of the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Holy Ancestor spoke.

The other Ancestors were not surprised, just because Ye Tian had just performed the same Ultimate Ancestral Technique as the Aoba Ancestor.

There is no way to teach the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, they can only create it themselves, and the two of them have created the same Ultimate Ancestral Technique, so they naturally don't believe it.

Therefore, there is only one possibility, that is, the ancestor of Aoba is Ye Tian's clone.

It is rumored that Ye Tian's doppelganger is special, just like the main body, it doesn't matter how he dies.

But now, this doppelganger can still achieve the Ancestor without affecting the ontology, which is terrifying!

"That's right!"

Aoba Ancestor spoke.

Once he made a move, there was no way to hide this matter, but he didn't need to hide it now, no one could threaten him in the dark forbidden realm.

"Sure enough!"

The ancestors said secretly.

"It is worthy of being the ancestor of ten thousand laws, I thought that the human race was really demonic, and two terrifying geniuses could be born, but now I know that it is the same person. Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, you have thrown your clone into the Dark Soul Domain, this is not in accordance with the rules!"

Holy Ancestor Dao.

"It's not in accordance with the rules, you also threw yourself into the Dark Soul Domain at that time!"

Ye Tian said sarcastically.

Many Ancestors were angry, but they couldn't.

"The Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, the Ancestor of All Things cannot die, he is the ancestor of our Dark Sacred Domain, once it falls, the strength of our Dark Sacred Domain will drop greatly!"

The Holy Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Kill one Ancestor, and I'll cultivate a few more Ancestors for the Dark Sanctuary!"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Are you really not giving me face?"

The Holy Ancestor said angrily.

Ye Tian continued: "Holy Ancestor, do you really want to be my enemy? My clone can exert the top ancestor combat power, and my body will truly reach the top ancestor combat power in the near future, even if I leave the Dark Soul Domain, I am also a top ancestor. You're going to be my enemy for the sake of a weak elite ancestor?"

The Holy Ancestor's expression changed, and only then did he understand that Ye Tian was not the weak ancestor before, but an existence that was truly equal to him.

The Ancestor of All Things is not under his command, and it is indeed not worth offending Ye Tian for the sake of the Ancestor of All Things.

Wow!

The Ancestor of All Things retreated, obviously not wanting to offend Ye Tian.

"Holy Ancestor !!!"

The Ancestor of All Things said in despair.

Finally, the thousandth attack came.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian blasted at the body of the Ancestor of All Things with all his strength.

In an instant, the body of the Ancestor of All Things was completely wiped out, and only an ordinary corpse was left floating there.

And as soon as the ancestor of all things died, the barrier dissipated.

With a move from Ye Tian's hand, the Innate Ancestor Weapon Long Sword fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Then, the corpse of the ancestor of all things was also collected by Ye Tian, which meant that all the treasures on his body belonged to Ye Tian.
